title: Someone Stole a Tractor and Led a Slow-Speed Chase
script: Someone stole a giant farm tractor and led police on the slowest chase you've ever seen. The suspect climbed into an unlocked tractor, fired it up, and rumbled down a rural highway at about fifteen miles an hour. Police cars trailed behind for miles, lights flashing, unable to do much because the tractor was too big to force off the road. Traffic backed up for a mile as the tractor plowed along, clipping mailboxes and road signs. It finally ended when the tractor ran out of fuel and coasted to a stop. So what makes someone steal a tractor of all things?
